steps.title: Find the direct reason
steps.content: The passage states “He wanted a long space to walk”—this is the explicit answer to why he moved the furniture.

steps.title: Connect the reason to the answer choices
steps.content: An uninterrupted path serves his need to think while walking, supported by the passage's description of him in “deep thought” about troubles. The other choices either invent details not in the text (disposal, family impression) or contradict the passage's emphasis on troubled reflection over vigorous exercise. That matches choice A — A is correct.
